calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-165 reverse replay diversity scheduler validation (redesign of EXQ-244)
items.note: EXQ-244 non_contributory (proxy substrate, no exploration source material). Fix: Phase 1 warmup with epsilon=0.5 exploration provides diverse trajectories into buffer. 3 conditions (NO_REPLAY/FORWARD_REPLAY/BALANCED_REPLAY) x 5 seeds. PASS if BALANCED entropy retention > FORWARD in >=3/5 seeds.

items.title: Reef fishtank showcase -- reef zone viz + shelter mode episode log
items.note: Generates reef-aware _episode_log.json for fishtank_viz.html: reef_cells per episode, in_reef per step, shelter mode, reef_entry/exit transitions. ARM_1_reef_food config from EXQ-522 (hazard_food_attraction=0.7).

items.title: MECH-098 reafference cancellation selectivity -- SD-047 multi-source dynamics
items.note: 3-arm: ARM_0 (no SD-047, no reafference), ARM_1 (SD-047, no reafference), ARM_2 (SD-047, reafference ON). Structured alternating noop/move eval. C1: ARM_2 move_delta < ARM_1 * 0.9; C2: ARM_2 noop_delta >= ARM_1 * 0.7; C3: ARM_2 selectivity > ARM_1. PASS = C1 AND C2 AND C3. Dry-run PASS.
